CREATE TABLE test_ascii (id INTEGER, char_value VARCHAR(10));
SELECT ascii(char_value) FROM test_ascii WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ascii(char_value) FROM test_ascii WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_ascii WHERE char_value = 'B');
SELECT (SELECT ascii(char_value) FROM test_ascii WHERE id = 3) AS ascii_value, id FROM test_ascii;
SELECT id, ascii(char_value) AS ascii_value FROM test_ascii WHERE ascii(char_value) > 64;
SELECT t1.id, (SELECT ascii(t2.char_value) FROM test_ascii t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id) AS ascii_value FROM test_ascii t1;
SELECT id FROM test_ascii WHERE ascii(char_value) = (SELECT MAX(ascii(char_value)) FROM test_ascii);
SELECT id, ascii(char_value) FROM test_ascii ORDER BY ascii(char_value);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_ascii WHERE ascii(char_value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ascii(char_value) FROM (SELECT char_value FROM test_ascii WHERE id = 2) AS subquery;
